title: Flaky Fried Portuguese Cabbage Dumplings
description: Salty and flaky Portuguese dish featuring cabbage leaves and miso marinade, perfect for a midnight craving. This high-protein-friendly recipe is a twist on traditional Portuguese cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the minced garlic and chopped onion to the marinade and stir well.
Add the cabbage leaves to the marinade and let it sit for at least 30 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, egg, salt, and black pepper to make the dumpling dough.
Lay a cabbage leaf flat and place a tablespoon of the dumpling dough in the center of the leaf.
Fold the cabbage leaf over the dough to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Heat about 1/2 inch of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
When the oil is hot, add the dumplings to the skillet and fry until they are golden brown and crispy.
Remove the dumplings from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the dumplings hot and enjoy.
